notes: Spec asserts: ready → working → waiting at ExitPlanMode tool_use; state never entered ready between plan emission and user reply. Recipe captures only the entry into waiting; the approve/reject continuation is structurally identical to user-blocking-question's resume path and is exercised by other recipes. ExitPlanMode is in the user-blocking tool set (tailer_config.go) and fires PreToolUse hook → PermissionPending=true (race-free with JSONL tool_use). Final state = waiting.

text: Session appears in ready after launch
User prompt (in plan mode) drives ready → working
Agent emits ExitPlanMode tool_use → user-blocking tool open → waiting (rule 1, race-belt by PermissionPending rule 0)
